ideation: This sequence will animate a cat-like pose, focusing on a playful, curious stance.  The arms will mimic a cat's front paws, starting in a relaxed position and moving into a playful crouch. The movement will be subtle, emphasizing the gentle nature of a cat.  The left arm will be slightly more active than the right, reflecting a cat's natural asymmetry.  We'll avoid jerky motions, opting for smooth transitions between frames.  The final frame will show the cat-like posture, ready to pounce or observe.

frames.beat: arms rest at the sides, a cat's calm stillness
the left arm lifts playfully, right arm mirroring slightly
both arms bend forward, paws reaching out curiously
a playful crouch, ready to pounce or observe
